summary: Comprehensive testing of LEXA Smart Home Platform - All 28 geo-targeted pages, 7 SEO service pages, 2 partner portals, Experience Centre CTA, and sitemap verified. Backend: 43/43 tests passed. Frontend: All pages load correctly with proper content.

minor.issue: Rate limiting may affect rapid testing (5 requests/minute)

issues: Minor: whatsapp.ts has hardcoded number 971521782109 instead of using NEXT_PUBLIC_WHATSAPP_NUMBER env variable (971501234567). Some components use env var correctly, others use hardcoded value.

geo_pages_api.details: GET /api/geo-pages returns 28 geo pages with all required fields (slug, title, meta_description, region, area_name, hero_headline)

geo_pages_frontend.details: All 28 geo pages return HTTP 200 - UAE (4), Saudi Arabia (4), GCC (4), MENA/Africa (6), Other UAE Emirates (10)

seo_service_pages.details: All 7 service pages load correctly: high-end-audio, home-theater, home-cinema, luxury-villa-automation, multi-room-audio, outdoor-audio, smart-lighting

high_end_audio_page.details: Contains brand names: Bowers & Wilkins, McIntosh, Focal, KEF, Bang & Olufsen, Naim Audio. HiFi keyword present.

architect_partner_portal.details: Partner Program tiers displayed: Registered (5%), Silver Partner (10%), Gold Partner (15%). Resource request API working.

developer_partner_portal.details: Volume Partner Program tiers displayed: Project Partner (8%), Development Partner (12%), Strategic Partner (18%). Toolkit request API working.

experience_centre_cta.details: Gallery carousel with 5 images auto-rotating, photo counter (1/5 photos), zone badges, Book a Visit form with all fields

booking_form.details: Quick Booking form has: Name, Phone, Date picker, 6 time slots (10AM-4PM), Confirm Booking button. API endpoint /api/experience-centre/booking working.

whatsapp_widget.details: WhatsApp floating widget visible on all pages. WhatsApp Quote buttons on service pages.

sitemap.details: sitemap.xml returns valid XML with 185 URLs including all geo pages (dubai, saudi-arabia, qatar, egypt, etc.)

homepage.details: Homepage loads with Hero, Solutions, Projects, Experience Centre sections. Cookie consent modal working.

action_items: MINOR: Consider updating /app/frontend/lib/whatsapp.ts to use process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_WHATSAPP_NUMBER instead of hardcoded number for consistency
critical_code_review_comments: All geo pages have proper location-specific content and SEO metadata
Partner portal tiers match requirements (Architects: 5%/10%/15%, Developers: 8%/12%/18%)
Experience Centre gallery has proper auto-rotation and navigation controls
WhatsApp integration working across the site with context-specific messages
seed_data_creation: Test bookings and resource requests created with TEST_ prefix during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 28 geo pages, 7 SEO service pages, 2 partner portals, Experience Centre CTA, and sitemap are fully functional. WhatsApp widget uses hardcoded number in whatsapp.ts but env var in other components. Rate limiting is 5 requests/minute for booking endpoint.
